section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report
free_text:
# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES
## Periodic Transaction Report

- **NAME:** Rohit Khanna
- **OFFICE TELEPHONE:** (202) 225-2631
- **[X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives** — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- **[ ] Officer or Employee** — Employing Office: (blank) (File an original and 1 copy)

**Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering?** [ ] Yes  [X] No
(If you answered "yes" to this question, please contact the Committee on Ethics for further guidance.)

**Please indicate whether this is an initial report or an amended report.** [X] Initial Report  [ ] Amendment
- Date of Report Being Amended: (blank)

*A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late.*

**Stamps (For Official Use Only):** HAND DELIVERED — LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER — 17 JUL 12 AM 9:54 — U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES. Handwritten initials "MC". Handwritten "Page 1 of 5" (the "5" written over the stamp text).

**Transaction grid:** header row with columns FULL ASSET NAME (SP/DC/JT), TYPE OF TRANSACTION (Purchase / Sale / Exchange), DATE OF TRANSACTION (MM/DD/YY), DATE NOTIFIED OF TRANSACTION (MM/DD/YY), AMOUNT OF TRANSACTION buckets A $1,001-$15,000; B $15,001-$50,000; C $50,001-$100,000; D $100,001-$250,000; E $250,001-$500,000; F $500,001-$1,000,000; G $1,000,001-$5,000,000; H $5,000,001-$25,000,00; I $25,000,001-$50,000,000; J Over $50,000,000; K Transaction in a Spouse or Dependent Child Asset over $1,000,000.

Greyed example row (ignored per spec): JT — Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock — Sale X — 02/05/015 — 03/07/15 — B X.

Only entry in the grid: "**Please see the attached**" (no checkboxes marked; remaining grid rows blank).

uncertainties.note: Handwritten '5' over the 'Page __ of __' stamp overlapping LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER text; page number itself not clearly visible but this is the first page of 5.
